test_cases.description: Verifies the 5-step pipeline is followed in the correct order
test_cases.input: I want to clone https://example.com. What's the process?

test_cases.description: Verifies correct source priority when sources disagree on design values
test_cases.input: Firecrawl says the primary color is #3b82f6 but Design Copier says #2563eb. Which should I use?

test_cases.description: Verifies correct Tailwind mapping for extracted CSS values from cloning
test_cases.input: The Playwright extraction found: font-size: 48px, padding: 64px, gap: 24px, border-radius: 12px. Convert to Tailwind.
